apps.name: Property Manager V1
apps.summary: Maintenance command center for small landlords: intake, dispatch, updates, and issue history.
apps.reviewGate: Beta candidate. Auth-boundary QA now passes cleanly end-to-end; remaining work is beta-readiness, broader coverage, and product polish.
apps.nextStep: Finish invite acceptance and keep pushing deployment, storage, onboarding, broader QA coverage, and workflow polish toward a stronger private beta.
notes: Mario: the right wedge is a maintenance command center, not an all-in-one property management suite.
Barry Bot: Core multi-role workflow is live: operator flows, tenant submission/timeline/photos, vendor dispatch/queue/detail, and credential-based auth are in place.

Barry Bot: Current gate is no longer the auth-boundary harness; Bob fixed the hard-coded-port timeout issue in commit 06a6e79 and the teardown hang in commit aac70e0, so auth regression coverage now passes and exits cleanly.
Barry Bot: Product direction is now cleaner: operator pays, tenant/vendor access is free, invite-based onboarding is the path, and regions/urgency/expected completion/import-export are in scope.

Barry Bot: Latest signal: vendor workflow, operator reporting, tenant attachment scoping, bilingual ticket progress display, and the cleaned-up auth QA path all landed while Elon remains primary build owner and Bob supports implementation.

apps.name: Clipboard Workflow Utility

apps.reviewGate: No review gate yet; this is not the active build.
